calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Modifying Trust
Off Calendar Jan-28-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Vaught Guardian Ad Litem for Lara Miloslavsky and Attorney for Nona Miloslavsky. Jennifer Seneberg for Alec Miloslavsky and Galina Miloslavsky.

Counsel had no other issues to bring to the Court. The Petition for Order Modifying Trust was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

Petition For Order Modifying Trust
Off Calendar Dec-16-2013 Continued To Jan-27-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jennifer Steneberg for Alec Miloslavsky.

The Court questioned whether Nona is capable of giving consent due to her disability, and whether the Guardian Ad Litem has authority to waive or disclaim any substantive rights on behalf of Lara (Minor). The Petition for Order Modifying Trust was continued to January 27, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Counsel to file a copy of the original Trust, the modified Trust and the new Trust that was created.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Chien. (Not Reported)
